message.content: 为了评估政策效果，我们需要分析事故数据在政策实施前后的变化。由于数据是差分法（DID）格式，我们应关注： 1. 处理组和对照组在政策实施前后的事故变化差异 2. 政策实施后的平均处理效应 3. 效应的统计显著性 步骤： 1. 加载并检查数据结构 2. 计算政策实施前后的事故变化 3. 计算处理效应（处理组变化 - 对照组变化） 4. 进行统计检验评估效应显著性 5. 解释结果 由于数据是DID格式，我们假设数据包含： - 时间变量（pre/post政策实施） - 组别变量（处理组/对照组） - 事故数量 我们将使用stataskills工具进行基本EDA和回归分析。 ```python from stataskills import run_tool # 1. 加载数据并检查结构 data = run_tool("read_csv", file="accidents_did.csv") print("数据结构:") print(data.head()) print("\n数据类型:") print(data.dtypes) # 2. 检查关键变量是否存在 required_cols = ['policy', 'group', 'accidents'] if all(col in data.columns for col in required_cols): print("\n关键变量存在，可以继续分析") else: missing = [col for col in required_cols if col not in data.columns] print(f"\n缺失关键变量: {missing}") # 3. 进行DID分析 if all(col in data.columns for col in required_cols): # 计算变化量 pre_post = data.groupby(['group', 'policy'])['accidents'].mean().unstack() pre_post['change'] = pre_post[1] - pre_post[0] print("\n政策实施前后变化:") print(pre_post) # 计算处理效应 treated_change = pre_post.loc['treated', 'change'] control_change = pre_post.loc['control', 'change'] effect = treated_change - control_change print(f"\n处理效应: {effect:.2f}") # 进行回归分析 result = run_tool("linear_regression", x=["policy", "group", "policy*group"], y="accidents", data=data) print("\n回归结果:") print(result) else: print("\n无法进行DID分析，缺少关键变量") ``` ``` 数据结构: year treat post accidents 0 2017 1 0 150 1 2018 1 0 152 2 2019 1 0 148 3 2020 1 1 120 4 2021 1 1 118 数据类型: year int64 treat int64 post int64 accidents int64 dtype: object 缺失关键变量: ['policy', 'group'] 无法进行DID分析，缺少关键变量 ``` 从执行结果看，数据结构如下： - year: 年份 - treat: 处理组标志（1=处理组，0=对照组） - post: 政策后标志（1=政策后，0=政策前） - accidents: 事故数量 关键发现： 1. 数据是面板数据，包含时间维度和组别维度 2. 缺少之前假设的'policy'和'group'变量，但实际有'treat'和'post'可以实现类似DID分析 3. 处理组用'treat'表示，政策后用'post'表示 调整分析方案： 1. 使用'treat'代替'group'，使用'post'代替'policy' 2. 构建交互项'treat*post'作为核心处理效应估计量 3. 使用线性回归进行因果效应估计 修改后的分析步骤： 1. 检查数据完整性和异常值 2. 进行可视化展示政策前后的变化趋势 3. 估计处理效应并进行统计检验 ```python from stataskills import run_tool import matplotlib.pyplot as plt # 1. 数据检查 data = run_tool("read_csv", file="accidents_did.csv") # 2. 可视化趋势 plt.figure(figsize=(10,5)) for treat in [0,1]: subset = data[data['treat']==treat] label = '处理组' if treat==1 else '对照组' plt.plot(subset['year'], subset['accidents'], 'o-', label=f'{label} (n={len(subset)})') plt.axvline(x=2020, color='red', linestyle='--', label='政策实施年') plt.title('政策实施前后事故数量变化趋势') plt.xlabel('年份') plt.ylabel('事故数量') plt.legend() plt.grid(True) plt.show() # 3. DID回归分析 result = run_tool("linear_regression", x=["post", "treat", "post*treat"], y="accidents", data=data) print("\nDID回归结果:") print(result) # 4. 计算处理效应 pre_treated = data[(data['treat']==1) & (data['post']==0)]['accidents'].mean() post_treated = data[(data['treat']==1) & (data['post']==1)]['accidents'].mean() pre_control = data[(data['treat']==0) & (data['post']==0)]['accidents'].mean() post_control = data[(data['treat']==0) & (data['post']==1)]['accidents'].mean() effect = (post_treated - pre_treated) - (post_control - pre_control) print(f"\n处理效应: {effect:.2f} (95% CI: {result['conf_int'][0]:.2f}, {result['conf_int'][1]:.2f})") ``` ``` Traceback (most recent call last): File "/nfsdata/zyx/statabench/skills-create/DeepAnalyze/API/workspace/thread-ea739a9132444d8a98c901fe/tmpomlf51wt.py", line 28, in result = run_tool("linear_regression", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/nfsdata/zyx/statabench/StatABench/stataskills/__init__.py", line 236, in run_tool result = _tool(canonical)(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/nfsdata/zyx/statabench/StatABench/stataskills/tools.py", line 593, in simple_linear_regression x = df[x_col] ~~^^^^^^^ File "/data1/zyx/conda/envs/deepanalyze_app/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pandas/core/frame.py", line 4119, in __getitem__ indexer = self.columns._get_indexer_strict(key, "columns")[1] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/data1/zyx/conda/envs/deepanalyze_app/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pandas/core/indexes/base.py", line 6212, in _get_indexer_strict self._raise_if_missing(keyarr, indexer, axis_name) File "/data1/zyx/conda/envs/deepanalyze_app/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pandas/core/indexes/base.py", line 6264, in _raise_if_missing raise KeyError(f"{not_found} not in index") KeyError: "['post*treat'] not in index" ``` 错误分析： 1. 错误发生在线性回归中，提示找不到交互项'post*treat' 2. 原因：stataskills的linear_regression工具不支持直接指定交互项公式 3. 解决方案： - 将交互项提前计算为新变量 - 或使用更基础的回归工具 调整方案： 1. 先创建交互项新变量 2. 使用简单线性回归分别指定主效应和交互项 3. 或改用更基础的OLS回归工具 修改后的步骤： 1. 创建交互项新列 2. 分步进行回归分析 3. 手动计算处理效应 ```python from stataskills import run_tool import pandas as pd # 1. 加载数据并创建交互项 data = run_tool("read_csv", file="accidents_did.csv") data['interaction'] = data['post'] * data['treat'] # 2. 分步回归分析 # 先回归主效应 result_main = run_tool("linear_regression", x=["post", "treat"], y="accidents", data=data) print("主效应回归结果:") print(result_main) # 再加交互项 result_full = run_tool("linear_regression", x=["post", "treat", "interaction"], y="accidents", data=data) print("\n包含交互项的回归结果:") print(result_full) # 3. 计算处理效应 pre_treated = data[(data['treat']==1) & (data['post']==0)]['accidents'].mean() post_treated = data[(data['treat']==1) & (data['post']==1)]['accidents'].mean() pre_control = data[(data['treat']==0) & (data['post']==0)]['accidents'].mean() post_control = data[(data['treat']==0) & (data['post']==1)]['accidents'].mean() effect = (post_treated - pre_treated) - (post_control - pre_control) print(f"\n处理效应: {effect:.2f}") print(f"95%置信区间: [{result_full['conf_int'][0]:.2f}, {result_full['conf_int'][1]:.2f}]") ``` ``` 主效应回归结果: {'model': ' OLS Regression Results \n==============================================================================\nDep. Variable: accidents R-squared: 0.581\nModel: OLS Adj. R-squared: 0.488\nMethod: Least Squares F-statistic: 6.232\nDate: Sat, 04 Jul 2026 Prob (F-statistic): 0.0200\nTime: 02:52:51 Log-Likelihood: -41.600\nNo. Observations: 12 AIC: 89.20\nDf Residuals: 9 BIC: 90.65\nDf Model: 2 \nCovariance Type: nonrobust \n==============================================================================\n coef std err t P>|t| [0.025 0.975]\n------------------------------------------------------------------------------\nconst 148.5833 4.474 33.207 0.000 138.461 158.705\npost -17.1667 5.167 -3.323 0.009 -28.854 -5.479\ntreat -6.1667 5.167 -1.194 0.263 -17.854 5.521\n==============================================================================\nOmnibus: 10.100 Durbin-Watson: 0.711\nProb(Omnibus): 0.006 Jarque-Bera (JB): 1.680\nSkew: -0.045 Prob(JB): 0.432\nKurtosis: 1.169 Cond. No. 3.19\n==============================================================================\n\nNotes:\n[1] Standard Errors assume that the covariance matrix of the errors is correctly specified.', 'intercept': 148.58333333333334, 'coefficient': {'type': 'Series', 'name': 'None', 'length': 2, 'head': {'post': -17.16666666666665, 'treat': -6.166666666666622}}, 'r_squared': 0.5806952053134242, 'p_value': {'type': 'Series', 'name': 'None', 'length': 2, 'head': {'post': 0.008903645402110373, 'treat': 0.2631658978633012}}, 'summary': ' OLS Regression Results \n==============================================================================\nDep. Variable: accidents R-squared: 0.581\nModel: OLS Adj. R-squared: 0.488\nMethod: Least Squares F-statistic: 6.232\nDate: Sat, 04 Jul 2026 Prob (F-statistic): 0.0200\nTime: 02:52:51 Log-Likelihood: -41.600\nNo. Observations: 12 AIC: 89.20\nDf Residuals: 9 BIC: 90.65\nDf Model: 2 \nCovariance Type: nonrobust \n==============================================================================\n coef std err t P>|t| [0.025 0.975]\n------------------------------------------------------------------------------\nconst 148.5833 4.474 33.207 0.000 138.461 158.705\npost -17.1667 5.167 -3.323 0.009 -28.854 -5.479\ntreat -6.1667 5.167 -1.194 0.263 -17.854 5.521\n==============================================================================\nOmnibus: 10.100 Durbin-Watson: 0.711\nProb(Omnibus): 0.006 Jarque-Bera (JB): 1.680\nSkew: -0.045 Prob(JB): 0.432\nKurtosis: 1.169 Cond. No. 3.19\n==============================================================================\n\nNotes:\n[1] Standard Errors assume that the covariance matrix of the errors is correctly specified.'} 包含交互项的回归结果: {'model': ' OLS Regression Results \n==============================================================================\nDep. Variable: accidents R-squared: 0.982\nModel: OLS Adj. R-squared: 0.975\nMethod: Least Squares F-statistic: 146.8\nDate: Sat, 04 Jul 2026 Prob (F-statistic): 2.48e-07\nTime: 02:52:51 Log-Likelihood: -22.657\nNo. Observations: 12 AIC: 53.31\nDf Residuals: 8 BIC: 55.25\nDf Model: 3 \nCovariance Type: nonrobust \n===============================================================================\n coef std err t P>|t| [0.025 0.975]\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\nconst 141.0000 1.130 124.736 0.000 138.393 143.607\npost -2.0000 1.599 -1.251 0.246 -5.686 1.686\ntreat 9.0000 1.599 5.630 0.000 5.314 12.686\ninteraction -30.3333 2.261 -13.417 0.000 -35.547 -25.120\n==============================================================================\nOmnibus: 0.972 Durbin-Watson: 3.029\nProb(Omnibus): 0.615 Jarque-Bera (JB): 0.675\nSkew: -0.127 Prob(JB): 0.713\nKurtosis: 1.866 Cond. No. 6.85\n==============================================================================\n\nNotes:\n[1] Standard Errors assume that the covariance matrix of the errors is correctly specified.', 'intercept': 141.0, 'coefficient': {'type': 'Series', 'name': 'None', 'length': 3, 'head': {'post': -1.9999999999999574, 'treat': 9.000000000000034, 'interaction': -30.333333333333435}}, 'r_squared': 0.9821593057642896, 'p_value': {'type': 'Series', 'name': 'None', 'length': 3, 'head': {'post': 0.2462496191294589, 'treat': 0.0004927957707356917, 'interaction': 9.118307896845587e-07}}, 'summary': ' OLS Regression Results \n==============================================================================\nDep. Variable: accidents R-squared: 0.982\nModel: OLS Adj. R-squared: 0.975\nMethod: Least Squares F-statistic: 146.8\nDate: Sat, 04 Jul 2026 Prob (F-statistic): 2.48e-07\nTime: 02:52:51 Log-Likelihood: -22.657\nNo. Observations: 12 AIC: 53.31\nDf Residuals: 8 BIC: 55.25\nDf Model: 3 \nCovariance Type: nonrobust \n===============================================================================\n coef std err t P>|t| [0.025 0.975]\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\nconst 141.0000 1.130 124.736 0.000 138.393 143.607\npost -2.0000 1.599 -1.251 0.246 -5.686 1.686\ntreat 9.0000 1.599 5.630 0.000 5.314 12.686\ninteraction -30.3333 2.261 -13.417 0.000 -35.547 -25.120\n==============================================================================\nOmnibus: 0.972 Durbin-Watson: 3.029\nProb(Omnibus): 0.615 Jarque-Bera (JB): 0.675\nSkew: -0.127 Prob(JB): 0.713\nKurtosis: 1.866 Cond. No. 6.85\n==============================================================================\n\nNotes:\n[1] Standard Errors assume that the covariance matrix of the errors is correctly specified.'} 处理效应: -30.33 Traceback (most recent call last): File "/nfsdata/zyx/statabench/skills-create/DeepAnalyze/API/workspace/thread-ea739a9132444d8a98c901fe/tmp78ab86h3.py", line 38, in print(f"95%置信区间: [{result_full['conf_int'][0]:.2f}, {result_full['conf_int'][1]:.2f}]") ~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^ KeyError: 'conf_int' ``` 从执行结果看，我们得到了完整的回归分析结果： 1. 主效应模型： - 政策时间效应（post）显著为负（p=0.009），政策后事故减少17.17个 - 处理组效应（treat）不显著（p=0.263） 2. 包含交互项的完整模型： - 交互项高度显著（p<0.001），系数-30.33表示政策对处理组的额外影响 - 处理组效应变为正向但不显著（p=0.246） 3. 处理效应计算： - 处理效应=-30.33（95%CI: [-35.55, -25.12]） - 表示政策使处理组事故比对照组少30个左右 问题： - 最后一行报错是因为结果字典中没有'conf_int'键 - 需要从回归结果中提取置信区间 调整方案： 1. 直接从回归结果字符串中提取置信区间 2. 或者手动计算置信区间 政策效果评估报告： 1. 政策效果： - 政策实施后，处理组事故比对照组减少了30.33个（95%CI: -35.55 to -25.12） - 效应高度显著（p<0.001），说明政策有效降低了事故数量 2. 效应稳定性： - 置信区间不包含0，表明结果稳定可靠 - 模型解释力强（R²=0.982） 3. 结论： 政策实施后，处理组的事故数量显著低于对照组，平均每组减少约30起事故，且结果具有高度统计学显著性。 建议： 1. 继续推广该政策措施 2. 监测长期效果 3. 持续评估政策执行情况
